hooks.name: Continuous Git Push on Save
hooks.description: Auto-stages, commits, and pushes to origin/main whenever a project source/config file is saved (skips when there is nothing to commit).

action.command: git add -A && (git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m "chore: autosave $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" && git push origin main))
